news.t: Amazon AI Bets Look Good for This ETF
Big Tech's AI Bets Pay Off: How to Play Latest Earnings
With Amazon Earnings Near, Consider These ETFs

holdings.infoBox: AMZU is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily AMZN Bull 2X ETF (AMZU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Amazon stock. AMZU was launched on Sep 7, 2022 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Amazon AI Bets Look Good for This ETF
data.text: With shares of Amazon (AMZN) up 28% over the past month, it's safe to say investors are at peace with the company's massive artificial intelligence (AI) spending plans.

data.title: Direxion's Dave Mazza delivers insights behind single-stock ETFs
data.text: Dave Mazza, Direxion head of product, joins the 'Halftime Report' to discuss single-stock ETFs, who is investing in the product and what they're doing with them.
